name: Enpro Inc.
description: Enpro Inc. is a leading industrial technology company that designs and manufactures high-performance components and materials for technology-intensive sectors. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, the company serves a diverse range of industries, including semiconductors, aerospace, power generation, heavy-duty trucking, agricultural machinery, chemical processing, and life sciences. By leveraging advanced engineering and material science, Enpro provides critical solutions that enhance the performance, reliability, and efficiency of its customers' operations globally. Listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NPO, the company maintains a strong commitment to innovation and operational excellence across its various business segments.
